title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 112.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Clare,
    Who was sadly pursued by a bear;
    When she found she was tired,
    She abruptly expired,
    That unfortunate Lady of Clare.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 112."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
